full_text:
Liu (Yuanqi) 劉? (元起)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu (劉?), styledYuanqi (元起). Liu Bei’s uncle. Recognized Liu Bei’s ambition and worked to maintain the family.
